characters.description: The leader of Fortune's Folly and master of the Pocket Delve. Arlo is a Level 10 dimensional mage whose teleportation, Soul Sight, protective auras, and bond with Grotto make him both a front-line combatant and the center of the party's support network.
characters.name: Arlo Xor'Drel

characters.description: The Core of the Pocket Delve and Arlo's soul-linked co-operator. Grotto can manifest, communicate mentally, administer his Delve, and assist Arlo's abilities. Their unusually close connection gives each of them insight into the other's condition.
characters.name: Grotto

characters.description: A politically connected Ravvenblaq swordsman and Fortune's Folly's front-line fighter. Varrin combines disciplined weapon work with an evolving spirit whose power and instability make it a significant concern for both him and the party.
characters.name: Varrin

characters.description: A divine fighter and healer in Fortune's Folly. Xim fights at close range with divine fire, shields, fear effects, and a formidable transformation, while her healing and defensive magic allow the party to survive otherwise fatal engagements.
characters.name: Xim

characters.description: A displaced Eschendur native who serves as an Inquisitor, scout, alchemist, and archer. Nuralie specializes in poisons, traps, precise ranged attacks, detection, and spiritual investigation, giving the party both battlefield control and careful analysis.
characters.name: Nuralie

characters.description: A sentient construct-bodied Delver with inherited memories and potent divine magic. Etja can use Nullify and Shared Vessel, but her origin includes a harmful connection to Orexis that remains a danger rather than an allegiance.
characters.name: Etja

characters.description: Arlo's resilient extradimensional combat summon. He can recover in his home dimension and return changed by his experiences, making him a powerful but independently minded ally whose physical, dimensional, and spiritual abilities continue to develop.
characters.name: Arlo's C'than summon

characters.description: A dangerous but apparently helpful avatar-linked power associated with Arlo's unusual eye-derived abilities and Traveler's Amulet. Fortune's interest has benefited Arlo, but the extent and purpose of that influence remain uncertain.
characters.name: Fortune

characters.description: A hostile divine influence tied to Etja's origin. A shard of Orexis's soul was concealed within her, leaving the party alert to the possibility that this connection may still threaten Etja or those around her.
characters.name: Orexis

characters.description: The powerful host of the special Delve's central chamber. Avarice receives Fortune's Folly amid the doomed aspirants after Varrin recovers from the final test. Her position suggests control over this stage, but her purpose and terms have not yet been explained.
characters.name: Avarice

characters.description: A goddess invoked by a visiting spatial mage in Arlo's Expansion Delve. She offers Arlo a choice and, under the terms he accepts, tames the dimensional plant while preserving the visitors' earned rewards.
characters.name: Yara

characters.description: Varrin's younger sister and an apprentice to House Ravvenblaq's Keeper of Decorum. She arrives at Arlo's estate while preparations are underway for a royal visit.
characters.name: Riona Ravvenblaq

characters.description: One of Eschendur's three theocratic rulers. The Triarch arrives at Arlo's domain before the Hiwardian delegation and offers sovereign recognition and potential treaties if Arlo creates a governing structure for his dimensional territory.
characters.name: Eschendur Triarch

characters.description: Hiward's ruler, a first-generation Delver and former leader of a slave rebellion with thirty platinum levels. He visits Arlo's Pocket Delve to assess the rapidly advancing party and the wider avatar crisis under carefully negotiated security limits.
characters.name: Hiwardian king

characters.description: Varrin's father and a senior Ravvenblaq Delver responding to the crisis at Arlo's estate. When the guarded lounge is found empty, Ealdric tests the apparent Kingsguard, immediately recognizes the detail as false, and acts with decisive force.
characters.name: Ealdric Ravvenblaq Sr.

characters.description: A hostile avatar who confronts Arlo in a Kingsguard disguise and admits abducting the king, Fortune's Folly, and other delegates. Hysteria uses illusion, mental attacks, elaborate deception, and identity-related threats.
characters.name: Hysteria

characters.description: A power Arlo invokes inside Hysteria's isolated void prison after Varrin's sister remains unable to join the group needed for escape.
characters.name: Dread Star

characters.description: A durable divine attacker in the five-person force assaulting Arlo's mansion. The paladin engages Arlo directly while supporting the other Wastelanders with healing and consecration, revealing a more versatile combat role than a simple front-line bruiser.
characters.name: Wasteland paladin

characters.description: A member of the five-person Wasteland assault force who attacks Xim at close range during the mansion battle.
characters.name: Wasteland martial fighter
